3. Livestreaming- I would love to set up a few virtual cameras on a virtual set in VR and go to different screens on set instead of just streaming webcam+code, give livecoding the full production of a TV show (plus I would love to cover an election live in VR)

You might say “EJ, that looks awesome but how would you actually use it?” 1. For collaboration, sharing a virtual space with other people as we all edit and tweak parameters together. 2. Client demos, showing a series of sketches and prototypes and options for a project
